title: Non-Monotonic Attention-based Read/Write Policy Learning for Simultaneous Translation

methodology.technique: Non-monotonic attention as monotonic attention with learnable read/write module
methodology.read_write_module: Binary classifier trained based on alignment from the pretrained model

advantages: Training efficiency: Only trains a lightweight read/write classifier
Inference efficiency: Only needs to run a small classifier, which is fast
related_approaches: Monotonic Attention (MA) with attention and policy components
Wait-k approach with fixed size policy
Non-streaming model with heuristics to estimate threshold based on MT confidence
problem_domain: Simultaneous translation with trade-off between quality and latency
